raw_triples.subject: java collections framework

raw_triples.subject: collection interface

raw_triples.subject: hashmap
raw_triples.evidence: JVM implements HashMap as an array of HashMap$Entry objects with each object having 4 fields: 1. int hash value computed using a hash function 2. Object key 3. Object value 4.
